name: @crewbee/project-context
description: Lightweight project context layer for Agent Coding and CrewBee integration.

scripts.diagnostics: node scripts/check-syntax.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/doctor-repo.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && npm run build && node scripts/check-types.mjs
scripts.doctor: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/main.js doctor
scripts.primer: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/main.js primer
